scripts.install:all: npm install -f && npm install -f --workspace=open-erp-services && npm install -f --workspace=open-erp-shared && npm install -f --workspace=open-erp-web && npm install -f --workspace=open-erp-mobile
scripts.audit:fix:all: npm audit fix && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-services && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-shared && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-web && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-mobile
scripts.dev: npm run shared:build && concurrently "npm run services:dev" "npm run notification:dev" "npm run shared:watch" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.dev:all: npm run shared:build && concurrently "npm run services:dev" "npm run notification:dev" "npm run shared:watch" "npm run web:dev" "npm run mobile:dev"
scripts.build:all: npm run shared:build && npm run services:build && npm run web:build && npm run mobile:build
scripts.test:all: npm run services:test && npm run web:test && npm run mobile:test
scripts.lint:all: npm run services:lint && npm run mobile:lint
